error_signature: output is a blank data object
title: HTTP Request to subdomain returns blank data
symptom: When making an HTTP request to a subdomain, the output is a blank data object instead of the expected content.
applies_when: Targeting a subdomain that loads content via JavaScript
not_this_if: Request to the main domain returns valid content
root_cause: The HTTP Request node in n8n only fetches static HTML and does not execute JavaScript. Subdomains that rely on client-side rendering (like React or Vue) will not return the full content, leading to blank outputs.
fix_steps: Use an external service that renders JavaScript, such as Browserless, ScrapingBee, or Apify.
Call the chosen service from n8n via an HTTP node to fetch the fully rendered page.
Convert the rendered HTML to Markdown.
agent_instruction: Use an external rendering service to fetch the content from the subdomain before converting it to Markdown.
